violations.text: The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. Paper towels made available at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/13/2025

Tzatziki Sauce, Shaved Steak, and Sliced Cheese were observed held at 44 degrees Fahrenheit in the cold drawer unit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Food items were moved to colder refrigeration at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/13/2025

Several food items sliced/prepared on site were observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 01/13/2025

A cup was observed to be used as a scoop in a container of dry ingredient. Utensils used to dispense non-time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods such as sugar and flour must be stored in the food item with their handles above the top of the food within the container. Cup was removed at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 01/13/2025

Pizza boxes were observed stored on a sheet of wood on the basement floor. SINGLE-SERVICE and SINGLE-USE ARTICLES shall be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 01/27/2025

At the time of inspection, the cold drawer unit was observed to be maintaining an ambient temperature of 43 - 44 degrees Fahrenheit with food temperatures at 44 degrees Fahrenheit. Unit is to be adjusted to colder temperature to ensure food items are held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below. New Violation. Correct By: 01/13/2025

The facility is lacking thermo-labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the kitchen dish machine. In hot water mechanical WAREWASHING operations, an irreversible registering temperature indicator shall be provided and readily accessible for measuring the UTENSIL surface temperature. New Violation. Correct By: 01/27/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the following were observed to have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris... - Storage shelving - Dry ingredient storage containers - Large mixer - Refrigeration internal surfaces - Faucet controls Non-FOOD-CONTACT SURFACES of EQUIPMENT shall be cleaned at a frequency necessary to preclude accumulation of soil residues. New Violation. Correct By: 01/20/2025

The ceiling air vent and surfaces nearby were observed to have an accumulation of dust and/or soil residue. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 01/27/2025

Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the kitchen. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/18/2023

Thermometers are lacking in the refrigeration units. Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 09/18/2023
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine in the kitchen. New Violation. Correct By: 09/18/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine and walk-in vent cover have an accumulation of bio-film. New Violation. Correct By: 09/18/2023
